case_title: IGOR KRYAN VS. FANTASY ART MUSEUM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRYAN, IGOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FANTASY ART MUSEUM $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,525.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KRYAN, IGOR AS TO DEFENDANT FANTASY ART MUSEUM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KRYAN, IGOR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$25.00) SERVED JUL-06-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FANTASY ART MUSEUM

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRYAN, IGOR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
